<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get an employee's custom fields"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/employees/{employee_id}/custom_fields"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a list of the employee's custom fields.

scope: `employees:read`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
